code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

fn apply(_ acc: Account, _ result: Result<Account, TxError>) -> Account
  match result
  when Ok(next)
    next
  when Err(_)
    acc
  end
end

mut acc = Account(balance: 100)
mut last_status = "ok"

let r1 = deposit(acc, 50)
acc = apply(acc, r1)
last_status = match r1
when Ok(_)
  "ok"
when Err(_)
  "overdraft"
end

let r2 = withdraw(acc, 30)
acc = apply(acc, r2)
last_status = match r2
when Ok(_)
  "ok"
when Err(_)
  "overdraft"
end

let r3 = withdraw(acc, 500)
acc = apply(acc, r3)
last_status = match r3
when Ok(_)
  "ok"
when Err(_)
  "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{last_status}")
